summary: Productized the selected district inspector and kept the district list as a secondary browser. The inspector now exposes localized player-facing terrain/economic traits, population, labor, grain, cash, route state, governance preview, appointment state, district effects, actions, and unavailable reasons from existing read-model and command-preview surfaces only. The route queue now supports search, route-status filtering, sort, folding, empty state, and bounded virtualized rendering while preserving map/selection sync and player/debug separation.

tests_run.result: Listed modified allowed-path files for Web/UI/client-core/tests/project status plus this handoff; no forbidden paths modified.
Task list emitted successfully; M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 is REVIEW.
Ready tasks listed: M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.

tests_run.result: JSON parse/shape check passed; task id, REVIEW status, route_to qa_reviewer, and required top-level fields verified.
Vitest UI suite passed: 1 file, 16 tests.
Vitest web suite passed: 1 file, 9 tests.
Vite web build passed; existing chunk-size warning remained.
Storybook static build passed; existing Vite chunk/plugin timing warnings remained.
Playwright Chromium suite passed: 19 tests, including M7 district inspector localization/secondary-browser/no-console/no-overflow coverage.
Format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions: Kept inspector data derived from existing client read-model slices: district rows, M3 administrative previews/obligations/enfeoffment, and M4 route/postwar projections.
Kept raw reason codes in dev/debug-only surfaces; player-facing reason displays continue through the i18n formatter.
Implemented route-status filtering as client-core read-model row selection, not UI-local domain rules.
Added district-empty and district-error web fixtures for UI validation only; no sim-core, protocol, content, map-renderer, or platform behavior changed.
risks: The current terrain/economic trait display is bounded by existing read models and uses season plus route/economy indicators; richer terrain taxonomy would require a future systems_architect/protocol route.
Some governance/effect associations are as granular as current read-model IDs allow; no WorldState or sim formulas were introduced to infer missing relationships.
Vite and Storybook still report pre-existing large chunk/plugin timing warnings, but builds pass.
requested_action: Review M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 for acceptance criteria, player/debug separation, i18n coverage, viewport behavior, and read-model/command-boundary compliance. Do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED until review passes.
